d: Rowan moves up to [[1]] tile and throws coins upon reaching the destination, recovering [[250]] Energy for surrounding allies within 2 tiles.
Increases Energy recovery to [[260]].
Increases Energy recovery to [[280]].
Increases Energy recovery to [[300]].
Increases Energy recovery to [[320]].

Rowan places [[2]] health potions on his trolley when a battle starts. Allies within [[2]] tiles with HP ratio below [[50%]] automatically uses a potion to recover [[40%]] of their max HP by up to [[800%]] of Rowan's ATK. Each ally can use up to 1 health potion every [[6]]s.
Increases recovery amount to [[42%]] of allies' max HP.
Places an energy potion when a battle starts. When the Energy of an ally within [[2]] tiles exceeds [[600]], they automatically use this potion to recover [[400]] Energy.
Increases recovery amount to [[45%]] of allies' max HP.
Rowan calls on Bradduck to attack an enemy, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage and absorbing [[70]] Energy.

If all health potions have been used up, Bradduck no longer launches attack but instead replenishes Rowan's trolley with a health potion. This effect can be triggered once every [[3]] times of Quack Waltz.
Increases damage to [[190%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Rowan increases his Haste by [[7]] during battle. His Haste is increased by an extra [[6]] before replenishing his trolley with Quack Waltz for the first time.
Rowan increases his Haste by [[10]] during battle. His Haste is increased by an extra [[8]] before replenishing his trolley with Quack Waltz for the first time.
Rowan increases his Haste by [[12]] during battle. His Haste is increased by an extra [[10]] before replenishing his trolley with Quack Waltz for the first time.

After selling [[3]] health potions, Rowan places a super health potion that recovers [[60%]] of an ally's max HP and permanently increases their Phys DEF and Magic DEF by [[30%]]. This effect can only trigger once per battle.
Increases the recovery amount of super health potion to [[65%]] of the ally's max HP, permanently increasing their Phys DEF and Magic DEF by [[35%]].
When Bradduck replenishes the health potions, one turns into a super health potion, triggered [[1]] time per battle.
Increases the recovery amount of super health potion to [[70%]] of the ally's max HP, permanently increasing their Phys DEF and Magic DEF by [[40%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first time an ally's HP drops below [[40%]], restores [[160%]]<ATK> HP to them and grants them a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: Rowan places [[1]] more health potion when a battle starts using Smart Stall.
罗万将“能量药剂”升级为超级的“能量药剂”，与原“能量药剂”使用方式相同，但补充能量后还会使目标攻击力提升[[30%]]，持续[[6]]秒。佩吉在场时，额外为她提供一瓶超级的“生命药剂”。
